title: GUI Slate Gray
description: The theme of bedrock buttons made into inventory GUI. (Mod support)
body:
# GUI Slate Gray

![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e5cbbf13b02c5a1cb7e36c1fc736b3add0a9154.png)

GUI Slate Brown is a GUI texture pack designed to match the button style seen in the Bedrock Edition of Minecraft. This pack replaces the entire UI and GUI interface of the game to what i beleve a less clutterd and more uniqe theme.

This is the second pack in this theme my first one is Slate Gui Brown. This is basically the same texturepack but the inventory is gray instead.

### Suppourted Mods:
- Appleskin
- Cosmetic Armour Reworked
- Farmers Delight
- Jei
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Soragedrawrs
- Toms Storage
